title: TerrariaMod
description: A mod that contains almost all the main content from the game Terraria!
body:
This is a mod based off a game called Terraria. It adds several new things from the game including items, tools, bosses. Currently, it is playable up to the twins.

If you would like to review this mod, feel free to DM on discord at Ryorama#6339 to get an early version of the mod.


Notable controls: M to toggle between Terraria and Minecraft hotbars.

Check my YouTube channel out for development previews: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIuLP8cttaRiArgewiclpiw

You can also find a quick overview trailer for the mod here https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NURRg8QW0wc&t=4s
